column1: # Phase 7 — `{MENUBRANCH loc}`. The cell at `loc` is row 0 of a
# custom menu (item names left-to-right, terminated by an empty
# cell). Row 1 is descriptions; row 2 is the action body for each
# item. On selection the macro BRANCHes to that action cell.
#   A1: '{MENUBRANCH menu}        (line 1: open the menu, then end)
# Build the menu range at E1..F3.
# Fire \M. Custom menu opens — line 2 shows the items, line 3 the
# Pick "Yes" by accelerator. The menu closes, the macro BRANCHes
